## Checklist

- [ ] Acceptance criteria are met.
- [ ] Sample data still works.
- [ ] Documentation was updated if needed.
- [ ] Relevant skill review or focused review pass is summarized above.
- [ ] Frontend changes include desktop/mobile screenshots or explain why not applicable.
- [ ] No API keys, local databases, or private raw data were committed.
